reason: Tests have implementation bugs causing gold to fail: test_isEleEllipsis_gated_by_combined_condition, test_tooltipProps_computed_before_measurement, and test_useEffect_dependencies_include_measurement_condition use content.indexOf('isEleEllipsis') which finds the import statement (line 27) instead of the actual usage inside useEffect (line 293). This causes the substring search to begin from the wrong position, and the regex for 'React.useEffect' fails because useEffect appears on line 27 but not as React.useEffect there. Even the gold fix with exact variable name 'needNativeEllipsisMeasure' fails these tests due to the indexOf bug. Tests need proper AST-based parsing or better code-region identification.
